mapper.sql: grp.group_code, grp.group_name, grp.use_yn, grp.description, grp.reg_date, grp.mod_date, grp.reg_user_key, grp.mod_user_key
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM common_group_code grp WHERE 1=1
AND grp.group_code LIKE '%' || #{groupCode} || '%'
AND grp.group_name LIKE '%' || #{groupName} || '%'
AND grp.use_yn = #{useYn}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO common_group_code (group_code, group_name, use_yn, description, reg_date, mod_date, reg_user_key, mod_user_key) VALUES (#{groupCode}, #{groupName}, #{useYn}, #{description}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, #{regUserKey}, #{regUserKey})
